claim: The TUI CLI driver hard-stopped on any valid NDJSON event larger than 1 MB, disconnecting long Read/Grep/tool_result responses mid-session.
evidence: internal/tui/cli/driver.go:328-348 bounded the bufio.Scanner buffer to 1 MB, and scanner.Err() tears the driver down as CLIDisconnectedMsg when a larger assistant line arrives.
runtimeTrigger: Ask the CLI to read or return a payload above 1 MB over stream-json; consumeEvents hits bufio.ErrTooLong and the TUI marks the driver dead instead of continuing the session.

claim: spawn_agent lost the final Claude result once accumulated stdout exceeded the 10 MB raw-buffer cap, so successful long-running agents completed with truncated NDJSON instead of their actual answer/cost/session metadata.
evidence: internal/tui/mcp/spawner.go buffered only the first maxBufferBytes of stdout before parsing for the result event; after truncation later NDJSON lines, including the final {"type":"result"} entry, were never retained for parsing.
runtimeTrigger: Spawn an agent that emits more than 10 MB of stream-json before the final result event; runSubprocess returns partial buffered output and zeroed metadata even though the subprocess exits successfully.
